name: Allianz Ayudhya Capital Public Company Limited
summary: Allianz Ayudhya Capital Public Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides non-life insurance products in Thailand. The company operates in two segments, Non-life Insurance Business and Investment Business. Its non-life insurance products include motor, fire, and marine and transportation insurance products, as well as miscellaneous insurance products, such as property, liability, engineering, and personal protection, including personal and group accident, domestic and international travel, cancer, micro insurance, burglary, money, machinery and erection, construction, workman compensation, electronics and computers, public liability, all risks, credit card, plate glass, and contractors' plant and machinery insurance products. The company was formerly known as Sri Ayudhya Capital Public Company Limited and changed its name to Allianz Ayudhya Capital Public Company Limited in April 2019. Allianz Ayudhya Capital Public Company Limited was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Pathumwan, Thailand.
